title: harness.config.json
description: Machine-specific values the portable hooks read. Lives at ~/.claude/harness.config.json. Holds NO secret values — only paths, commands, and locators.

machine_label.description: Free-text label for this machine, e.g. 'work-laptop'. Informational.

project_roots.description: Directories that contain per-project repos (each project = an immediate subdir). Used by session-context (CLAUDE.md surfacing) and tokens.py audit. e.g. ['~/work/repos'].

protected_globs.description: Immutable paths. Any Edit/Write or write-ish Bash targeting a match is blocked by guard.py. e.g. ['~/data/raw/**'].

secret_file_globs.description: Extra filename globs to treat like a real secret file (beyond the universal .env baseline guard.py already blocks).

commit_gate.description: Override the commit-gate's typecheck/test commands. Leave empty to auto-detect by project markers (package.json, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml, go.mod).

lint_fix.description: Per-file format-on-edit. command is a template; '{file}' is replaced with the edited path. Empty = auto-detect (eslint/ruff/black/rustfmt/gofmt).

token_registry_path.description: Where tokens.py stores its METADATA-ONLY registry.

token_target_types.description: The sync-target types this machine uses, for the token-rotation skill. e.g. ['env','ci-secret','deploy-env','console'].

deploy.description: Deploy adapter — fills the generic `deploy` skill. No secret values.

deploy_target.description: e.g. vercel | fly | netlify | k8s | ssh:<host> | none

secrets_store.description: e.g. gh-secrets | vault | aws-sm | doppler | platform-env

git_host.description: e.g. github | gitlab | bitbucket | azure-devops. Informational for skills.
